latestPosts.caption:
I almost lost my mom to a toxic job…

And I wrote this book because I saw first hand what the wrong job can do to you. Comment MOM to get our free pivot guide + all the pre-order bonuses. ❤️

My sweet momma worked 20+ years in a casino to support our family, and one day after work, couldn’t stop coughing up blood. We rushed her to the hospital for emergency surgery and found stage 3 endometrial cancer…. it was devastating. 

Luckily there is a happy ending to this story as my mom is now retired and recovering her to full strength but it’s something that’s shaped how we all look at our precious lives and careers. 

Work should fuel your life, not drain it. And in my book I talk about the exact steps I teach our clients to find what their ideal looks like and go all in to go get it. 

It is now available for preorder and it would mean the world to me if you go out and get a copy and gift a copy to those you love! 

If you read the book and implement the steps, it’ll completely change your life and career. Comment MOM to get the link and claim all your pre-order bonuses. 

And of course Happy Mother’s Day to my strong momma and all the super moms out there! We love you all ❤️

Thank you for your kind support.

Follow @workhap to curse all your enemies too 😌🤣

I’m in HK and passed by the iconic spot. Even Speed dropped by in his HK trip lol

To go the exact spot: go to the Canal Road West tram stop in Causeway Bay and you’ll see the aunties under the bridge! 

#career #jobs #hongkong #curse

Ridiculous test but how to PASS IT! 

And follow @workhap for daily career vids to get hired, paid, and HAPPY in your career!

I know it’s crazy we have to think what to do with a damn coffee cup but it just goes to show that companies judge you on the little things!

And ultimately it’s going to be these questions that you have to be a YES to get the job:

1. Do I like you?
2. Can you do the job?
3. Are you different?

I outline how to pass this coffee cup test in the video. But have you ever seen this play out in interviews?

Let me know in the comments!

Intro by @ chelsea.pixels

#career #jobs #coffeecup
